prompt:
Use case: proof through tools beat
Primary request: Show proof through tools rather than slide decks: explainable alert logic, offline document outputs, deterministic alerts, local data cues. No logos, no people, no unsupported SaaS UI.
Scene/background: modular panels floating in a black environment, each showing one kind of evidence: explainable rule logic, offline document summaries, deterministic alerting, local data cues
Subject: open-source, deterministic, local-first instruments
Action: beat 1 (0-1.3s) first panel reveals explainable alert logic; beat 2 (1.3-2.6s) second panel reveals structured document output; beat 3 (2.6-4s) all panels align in one clean system tableau
Camera: lateral slide across panels ending centered
Lighting/mood: serious, technical, trustworthy
Color palette: black, off-white, burnt orange, muted graphite
Style/format: editorial product montage without brand logos
Audio: subtle mechanical clicks, controlled pulse
Text (verbatim): "DETERMINISTIC. LOCAL-FIRST. EXPLAINABLE."
Constraints: no logos; no fabricated product UI; no SaaS dashboard framing
Avoid: unreadable terminal text, code rain, fake holograms
